value: Constitución Política de los Estados Unidos Mexicanos (CPEUM)
Tribunal Electoral del Poder Judicial de la Federación (TEPJF)
Universal, direct, secret, equal, free (Art. 35 Fr. I CPEUM)
Monist with constitutional supremacy; Art. 1 CPEUM (2011 reform) — pro persona
ICCPR Art.25, ACHR Art.23, HRC GC25, CEDAW Art.7, CRPD Art.29 not in corpus — conventionality analysis requires manual review
Sub-national (state) electoral legislation not in corpus
No TEPJF/SCJN jurisprudence text files in corpus
2023 electoral reform (DOF 02-03-2023) substantially invalidated by SCJN (DOF 24-11-2023) — affected provisions restored to pre-reform text
